allow: PowerShell($dirs = @\('src','src\\components','src\\dialogs','src\\hooks','src\\lib','src\\styles','src\\types','src-tauri','src-tauri\\src','src-tauri\\src\\api','src-tauri\\src\\commands','src-tauri\\src\\database','src-tauri\\src\\managers','src-tauri\\src\\matcher','src-tauri\\src\\models','src-tauri\\src\\services','src-tauri\\src\\sync','src-tauri\\icons'\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $d | Out-Null })
